_note: Personal betting selections for Gold Cup Day — 13 Mar 2026. Regenerated into HTML via update_barrys_html.py.
day: Day 4 — Gold Cup Day (Soft going throughout)

bets.reason: Saratoga connection — beat Saratoga at Naas Feb 7. Saratoga then WON the Fred Winter at this Festival on Tuesday. Only Festival-frankened form line in the race. Elliott/Kennedy. 3/3 unbeaten.

bets.betfair_note: VALUE: Exchange 47/1 vs bookie 28/1 — USE BETFAIR
bets.reason: 2nd in 2025 County Hurdle — the winner of that race was Kargese. Kargese WON the Arkle at this Festival on Tuesday. Identical franking chain to Highland Crystal/Saratoga. Won 2025 Galway Hurdle. Fit (AW Flat run Feb 2026). Elliott/Meyler.

bets.betfair_note: Exchange 2.85/1=11/4 — matches bookie; Dinoblue fav at 3.15
bets.reason: Won EXACT C+D — Paddy Power Gold Cup Cheltenham 2m4f soft Nov 2025 (12 runners). 3/3 wins since including Coral Gold Cup at Newbury. Freshest specific C+D form in race. Skelton/Skelton firing.

IMPROVING OUTSIDER: 2nd to Spindleberry at Leopardstown Dec 2025 (race Spindleberry dominated). Gets 5lb better today. Soft ground specialist — all her best form on soft/heavy. 4 places paying. Wadham/Cannon sneaky each-way play.

outsiders.arc: 2nd Leopardstown Dec 2025 (to Spindleberry) → drops back 5lb today

bets.reason: BANKER — DB gap 27pts (largest of Festival). Won DRF Grade 1 by 8 lengths despite keenness. Townend rides over all other Mullins horses. Kazansky (2nd) is in today's field and confirmed the form.

IMPROVING OUTSIDER: 5th Cheltenham Nov 2025 → won Warwick 2m5f Dec → won Windsor 3m soft Jan 2026. Wind surgery unlocked improvement. COURSE FORM (ran at Cheltenham in November). 3m suits — stamina proven at Windsor. Skelton/Skelton firing. D symbol.

IMPROVING OUTSIDER: 3rd Clonmel Dec → won Fairyhouse 2m4f Jan (18-runner) → won Punchestown 2m3f heavy Jan 2026. Unbeaten 3-run sequence. 'On pedigree and running style the step to 3m is a major plus' — unexposed at this trip. Elliott/Kennedy. 5 EW places.

bets.betfair_note: VALUE: Exchange 37/1 vs bookie 33/1 — use exchange
bets.reason: IMPROVING OUTSIDER: won Leicester Dec → won Leicester Jan → 2nd Haydock 3m Grade 2 (Feb 14). Perfect 3-run arc, 'winner got first run and it could have been interesting'. Stamina proven in Grade 2, lightly raced 3m winner. Murphy/Sutton. 5 EW places.

outsiders.arc: 5th Cheltenham Nov → 1st Warwick Dec → 1st Windsor 3m Jan
3rd Clonmel Dec → 1st Fairyhouse Jan (18-runner) → 1st Punchestown Jan
1st Leicester Dec → 1st Leicester Jan → 2nd Haydock 3m G2 Feb

bets.betfair_note: Exchange fav 3.4/1=7/2; Jango Baie 4.6, Jukebox Man 4.8
bets.reason: Franking chain: beat Fact To File? No — was 2nd to Fact To File in Irish Gold Cup (Feb 2). Fact To File WON the Ryanair at this Festival YESTERDAY. DB pattern: Mullins Arkle winner → Gold Cup (Galopin Des Champs identical trajectory). Townend rides. Soft ground specialist. Finishing strongly despite keenness.

IMPROVING OUTSIDER / PEAKING: won NHC Cheltenham Mar 2025 → won Welsh National Chepstow Dec → won Denman Chase Newbury Feb 2026. PERFECT 3-WIN PEAKING ARC. Denman Chase is the historic Gold Cup trial (Denman himself used it). 6-8 over fences. Sean Bowen. 3 places paying EW.

outsiders.arc: 1st NHC Cheltenham Mar 25 → 1st Welsh National Dec → 1st Denman Chase Feb

bets.betfair_note: SIGNAL: Exchange FAVOURITE at 4.7/1 — shorter than bookie 5/1
bets.reason: Bridesmaid 3 years running (2023/24/25). Won Down Royal Dec 2025 (16-runner, beat Willitgoahead + Cons Roc — both in today's field). Same prep as last year when he pushed Wonderwall to a neck. 'All roads lead to this.' Emmet Mullins.

IMPROVING OUTSIDER: won Warwick 3m soft Jan 23 → won Taunton 2m7f heavy Feb 12. 2-win peaking arc, 'not remotely pressed' in either. Paul Nicholls has won this race FOUR TIMES. 8yo — young and unexposed in hunters. 4 places paying.

IMPROVING OUTSIDER: 2nd Hereford Jan 26 → won Fakenham Feb 13. Won NHC AT THIS FESTIVAL (3m6f) 4 years ago. P. W. Mullins rides. Cheekpieces first time. Better than his small-field form figures suggest. 4 places.
IMPROVING OUTSIDER: form 8/U/3/1/1 — dramatic peaking arc. Won Thurles Jan (13-runner) + Naas Feb (5-runner heavy). Former Grand National entry with class. High RPR at Naas. 4 places.

outsiders.arc: 3rd Naas Mar 25 → 1st Thurles Jan → 1st Naas Feb

bets.betfair_note: Martin Pipe market suspended pre-race — use bookie 4/1
bets.reason: Biggest market move of the race: 16/1 pre-Festival → 4/1 today. Mullins stable target. KEY ANGLE: all recent runs at 2m on heavy (two 5th places) — today steps to 2m4f for first time. Extra trip is the improvement trigger. Lightly raced 6yo (only 6 hurdle runs). Power Prices explicit win selection.

bets.betfair_note: Martin Pipe market suspended — use bookie 11/1
bets.reason: IMPROVING OUTSIDER: 2nd to horses who ran in the Supreme Novices' Hurdle on Tuesday. Festival-level form. OR 131 = lightest mark of main contenders. 11-2 weight — easiest task on paper. Unexposed at 2m4f. 5 places paying. Mullins. Remarkable value.

bets.betfair_note: Martin Pipe market suspended — use bookie 25/1
bets.reason: IMPROVING OUTSIDER / HISTORICAL PATTERN: form 1/4/2 last 3 runs — won Naas Dec (20-runner), 4th Cheltenham Jan (C+D), 2nd Thurles Feb 19. The Thurles race is the EXACT prep race that produced Gordon Elliott's Martin Pipe WINNERS in 2017 AND 2018. Identical template. C+D form. 5 places.

bets.betfair_note: Martin Pipe market suspended — use bookie 20/1
bets.reason: IMPROVING OUTSIDER: won Tramore Jan → won Ayr Jan → 3rd Punchestown Listed Feb. 2-win peaking arc. Elliott. Bred for 2m4f (jumps wins at 2m1f — distance should suit today). HANDICAP DEBUT under Josh Williamson (1-1 record together). 5 places.

bets.betfair_note: Martin Pipe market suspended — use bookie 18/1
bets.reason: IMPROVING OUTSIDER: 2nd Haydock Nov → won Newbury 2m4f GS Dec (last run). Won last time out at the right trip. D symbol (distance winner). Improving 6yo off low mark (OR 133). Gordon/Chris Gordon yard — quiet but effective. 5 places.

outsiders.arc: 2nd Fairyhouse Jan (to Supreme horse) → 2nd Thurles Jan (to Supreme horse)
1st Naas Dec (20-runner) → 4th Cheltenham C+D Jan → 2nd Thurles Feb (Elliott prep pattern)
1st Tramore Jan → 1st Ayr Jan → 3rd Punchestown Listed Feb
